items.label: The method
items.text: Compare one surviving anchor, the street geometry, the scale of empty space and any later reconstruction.

items.label: The best case study
items.text: Mehringplatz preserves the old circular idea and Peace Column inside a postwar housing scheme.

items.label: Where to stand
items.text: Start south of the Friedenssäule, face north and follow the opening toward Friedrichstraße.

items.label: The caution
items.text: Historic and current photographs rarely share the same position or lens, so compare evidence rather than pixels.
